notice_set_password: Please set the password in the settings page for the Password Protection Plugin first!
setting_folder_desc: The default value '/' is the root path of the vault
setting_toggle_desc: To enable password protection you will set your password, to disable it you will need to verify your password.
hint_enter_in_both_boxes: Please enter your password in both boxes.
hint_password_length: Password must contain valid characters and must be 1-20 characters long.
set_password_title: Set a password to protect a folder
enter_password_to_verify: Please enter your password to unlock.
auto_lock_interval_desc: The number of minutes to wait before auto-locking since the protected file was opened.
before_open_protection: Turn on the above switch to enable password protection, and disable the below options.
setting_pwd_hint_question_desc: Please type a question to help you remember your password.
setting_more_path: More folders or files to be protected (up to 6)
notice_locked_write_blocked: This file is encrypted and the vault is locked. Unlock first to edit it.
notice_decrypt_failed: Failed to decrypt {{path}}. The file may be corrupted or encrypted with a different password.
setting_mode_desc: Session: files stay plaintext on disk and only the Obsidian UI is locked. Encrypted: files are written as ciphertext on disk; if you forget your password the data cannot be recovered.
bulk_encrypt_confirm_body: This will rewrite every Markdown file under {{folder}} as ciphertext. If you forget your password these files become unreadable.
bulk_decrypt_confirm_body: This will rewrite every encrypted Markdown file under {{folder}} as plaintext.
bulk_reencrypt_confirm_body: Your password change will rewrite {{count}} encrypted file(s) using the new password. Do not interrupt this operation.
bulk_failures_console_hint: See developer console for per-file errors.
mode_flip_to_encrypted_title: Switch this folder to encrypted mode?
mode_flip_to_encrypted_body: New files in {{folder}} will be encrypted on disk. Encrypt the {{count}} existing plaintext file(s) now? You can also do this later from settings.
mode_flip_to_session_title: Switch this folder to session mode?
mode_flip_to_session_body: New files in {{folder}} will be plaintext on disk. The {{count}} already-encrypted file(s) will stay encrypted unless you decrypt them now.
disable_guard_body: Disabling protection while files are encrypted would lock you out of them. Decrypt every encrypted file in the vault first, then disable.
setting_change_password_desc: Re-encrypts every encrypted file with the new password. Cannot be undone.
change_password_no_encrypted_files: No encrypted files found. Updating password only.
picker_truncated: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} matches. Refine your search to narrow.
protected_paths_section_desc: Pick folders or notes to protect, set a mode for each, and run bulk encrypt/decrypt as needed.
protected_paths_empty: No paths protected yet. Click "Choose paths…" to start.
protected_paths_remove_tooltip: Remove this path. Already-encrypted files stay encrypted on disk.
notice_unlock_first: Unlock the vault before encrypting or decrypting files.
